Bridge Race

Race against 3 AI opponents across multi-lane tracks to be the first to cross the finish line! Collect colored blocks scattered on the track and use them to build bridges over water gaps. Knock into opponents to make them drop blocks, which you can steal. Progress through increasingly challenging levels with longer tracks, wider gaps, and more aggressive AI.

Controls: Arrow Left/A: Steer left | Arrow Right/D: Steer right | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu

TEST_5.expected_outcome: AI opponents should autonomously collect blocks, build bridges when needed, and race toward the finish line. Higher levels should show more aggressive and efficient AI behavior. Test successful if AI demonstrates competent racing behavior.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Ensures game state is properly managed during pause and restart operations.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Start game, pause with ESC during active gameplay, verify game freezes. Unpause and continue. Trigger game over state and restart with R.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: ESC pauses and unpauses correctly. All physics and gameplay pause during PAUSED state. R key returns to START screen from game over. Test successful if state transitions work without errors.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing lane steering and boundary constraints. Validates that player can move between lanes smoothly and cannot leave the track boundaries.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Rapidly alternate between left and right steering inputs. Try to steer beyond leftmost and rightmost lanes. Test smooth lane transitions.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Player smoothly transitions between lanes using arrow keys. Player is constrained within track boundaries and cannot go off-track. Test successful if steering is responsive and boundaries are enforced.
